-- 1. apply xd rules to adult heii data
delete from [appl].[elsevier_deid_heii_t];
GO

)
select
  input_token
  , record_id
  , AddrChangeCount01
  , AddrChangeCount03

  , SubPrimeOfferRequestCount12
  , SubPrimeOfferRequestCount24
FROM 
  [customer].[ext_inc_heii_t] a
  left join [appl].[elsevier_claims_minor_tokens_t] b
  on a.input_token = b.token
where 
  b.token is null and (a.age_in_years = '' or cast(a.age_in_years as float) >= 18)
;


-- 2. apply xd rules to youth heii data
insert into [appl].[elsevier_deid_heii_t]
(
  input_token
  , record_id
)
select
  input_token
  , record_id
FROM 
  [customer].[ext_inc_heii_t] a
  left join [appl].[elsevier_claims_minor_tokens_t] b
  on a.input_token = b.token
where 
  b.token is not null or (age_in_years <> '' and cast(a.age_in_years as float) < 18)
;
